session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci to execute fast CI checks

session.assistant:
Perfect! All checks passed. Here's the summary:
**make fast-ci: PASSED**
All checks completed successfully:
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1727 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK (reference.md is up to date) - **Type Checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 6011 passed in 26.01s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 6.04s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.85s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: Tests passed with 0 CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md violations
No errors or issues found.
